source.inputShape: list of teams with nested players
source.levelRule: level 0 = finalOverall - 20; level 20 = finalOverall; +1 overall per level
source.categoryRule: category is copied from Inazuma Codex and is not recalculated per level
source.statsRule: top-level rating stats 1-10 are converted to finalStats 1-100

validation.method: Every overall and every stat at every level decoded and compared
